summary: A highly praised favorite performance, though reviewers give no details on recording quality.
review: The lone five‑star review declares this show one of the reviewer’s favorites, indicating strong enthusiasm for the music. However, the comment provides no specifics about the soundboard, audience mix, or particular songs, leaving the technical quality and musical highlights undocumented.
